idea: реализуй функционал - если я пишу в чат то мне всегда должен отвечать ПМ и дальше при неоходимости передавал задачи которые мы определим.

business_requirements: Implement a chat system where every user message receives a response from the Project Manager (PM).
Enable the PM to delegate or forward tasks based on the conversation context.
Define criteria or triggers for when tasks should be passed on.
Ensure seamless communication flow between the user, PM, and task management.

user_stories.goal: Send messages in the chat and receive responses from the PM
user_stories.benefit: To get timely and relevant answers from the PM for my queries

user_stories.goal: Respond to all user messages in the chat
user_stories.benefit: To maintain clear communication and manage tasks effectively

user_stories.goal: Forward or assign tasks based on chat discussions
user_stories.benefit: To ensure tasks are tracked and completed by the appropriate team members

edge_cases: User sends multiple messages in quick succession before PM responds
PM is unavailable or offline to respond to messages
Ambiguous messages that do not clearly indicate a task to be forwarded
Handling messages that are not related to tasks or project management
Ensuring task forwarding does not create duplicate or conflicting assignments
assumptions: There is a designated PM responsible for responding to all chat messages
The system can identify when a message requires task delegation
Users expect a response from the PM for every message they send
Tasks can be created or forwarded automatically or manually by the PM
The chat platform supports integration with task management tools

tasks.description: Develop the chat message handling system to receive user messages and generate PM responses.
acceptance_criteria: System receives user messages and stores them.
PM responses are generated and sent for every user message.
Message timestamps and order are maintained to handle multiple quick messages.

tasks.description: Implement task delegation logic triggered by chat message content.
acceptance_criteria: System identifies messages that require task delegation based on defined criteria.
Tasks can be created or forwarded automatically or manually by the PM.
Duplicate or conflicting task assignments are prevented.

tasks.description: Create criteria and triggers for when tasks should be passed on from chat messages.
acceptance_criteria: Criteria for task delegation are clearly defined and configurable.
Triggers activate task creation or forwarding appropriately.
Ambiguous messages do not trigger task forwarding without PM confirmation.

tasks.description: Integrate chat system with task management tools to enable seamless task creation and forwarding.
acceptance_criteria: Chat platform successfully connects with task management APIs.
Tasks created or forwarded from chat appear correctly in task management system.
Task updates and statuses synchronize between chat and task management.

tasks.description: Build the chat user interface for users to send messages and receive PM responses.
acceptance_criteria: Users can send messages and see PM responses in real-time.
UI handles multiple quick messages gracefully without losing order.
Indicates when PM is offline or unavailable.

tasks.description: Create PM interface to respond to user messages and manage task delegation.
acceptance_criteria: PM can view incoming user messages and respond promptly.
PM can manually forward or assign tasks based on conversation.
PM can review ambiguous messages before forwarding tasks.

changes.diff:
--- a/app/chat/message_handler.py
+++ b/app/chat/message_handler.py
@@ -0,0 +1,48 @@
+import datetime
+import threading
+from collections import deque
+
+class Message:
+    def __init__(self, user_id, content, timestamp=None):
+        self.user_id = user_id
+        self.content = content
+        self.timestamp = timestamp or datetime.datetime.utcnow()
+
+    def to_dict(self):
+        return {
+            'user_id': self.user_id,
+            'content': self.content,
+            'timestamp': self.timestamp.isoformat()
+        }
+
+class MessageStore:
+    def __init__(self):
+        self._messages = deque()
+        self._lock = threading.Lock()
+
+    def add_message(self, message):
+        with self._lock:
+            self._messages.append(message)
+
+    def get_all_messages(self):
+        with self._lock:
+            return list(self._messages)
+
+message_store = MessageStore()
+
+def generate_pm_response(user_message):
+    # Placeholder for PM response generation logic
+    # For demonstration, echo back with a prefix
+    response_content = f"PM Response to: {user_message.content}"
+    response = Message(user_id='pm', content=response_content)
+    return response
+
+def handle_user_message(user_id, content):
+    user_message = Message(user_id=user_id, content=content)
+    message_store.add_message(user_message)
+    pm_response = generate_pm_response(user_message)
+    message_store.add_message(pm_response)
+    return user_message, pm_response
changes.rationale: Implemented a thread-safe message store to receive and store user messages with timestamps. Added PM response generation for each user message and stored responses maintaining order and timestamps.
